description_long: This shotgun features a compact bullpup design with a matte black finish and a distinctive integrated sight rail on top. The body is primarily constructed from a combination of metal and polymer, with a visible magazine running parallel to the barrel above the trigger group. The trigger guard is large and rounded, forming a continuous loop with the grip, and includes ergonomic finger grooves for improved handling. The stock is integrated into the main body, providing a streamlined, tactical appearance. The shotgun is equipped with a top-mounted optic and a short, vented barrel, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, black bullpup shotgun with an integrated sight rail, ergonomic grip, and a top-mounted optic, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the sight rail, optic, and the full length of the magazine and barrel.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the bullpup configuration, integrated stock, and ergonomic grip with finger grooves.
description_view_2: Front view focusing on the muzzle, sight alignment, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the magazine, stock integration, and the overall streamlined design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and vented, with no visible ribbing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded, elongated with integrated finger grooves
